notes: This image has two distinctive 'rare-capture' features that distinguish top performers: (1) accurate French OCR with both diacritics (grave on À, acute on É), and (2) recognition that the swirling tape forms the Spotify logo - a key conceptual element given the 'Spotify-themed' ground truth. Only the two qwen3.6-27b variants (think and nothink) and qwen3-vl-8b captured both. The glm-4.6v-flash-9b struggled with OCR (missing accent on É, added comma). The gemma4-e4b had the most serious error - misidentifying the cassette tape as a cassette tape player/deck. Most models hallucinated cassette 'control buttons'/'switches' that are not visible in this marker drawing of just the cassette itself. Scores cluster high (9-10) because most models captured the dominant cassette+French text+green palette features correctly, with the top performers distinguished by catching the Spotify logo transformation.
